transcript: Customer: This is an emergency, my shower valve has low water pressure and it's getting bad! This is Sarah Johnson at 200 Market Street. Dispatcher: Okay Sarah, stay calm. I'm getting a technician dispatched to 200 Market Street right now. Customer: Please hurry. Dispatcher: A tech is on the way, they'll call you when they're close.

expected_entities.issue: emergency: shower valve has low water pressure
